method: market scan -> mispricing score -> stock-vs-LEAPS choice -> ranked picks

rows.name: GE Vernova on grid equipment and transformer buildout
rows.thesis: GE Vernova appears to sit in a constrained grid equipment and transformer buildout layer, with filing-backed component specificity, pressure signals, and capacity-expansion evidence that may still be underappreciated.
rows.value_capture_layer: Constrained upstream component supplier with system-level leverage
why_missed: market attention is concentrated on downstream power and AI beneficiaries
constrained component-layer suppliers are less obvious from headline buildout coverage
catalysts: order backlog conversion into reported revenue
invalidations: capacity expansion arrives without meaningful demand conversion
component or backlog signals fade in subsequent company reporting
downstream demand shifts to substitute suppliers or adjacent architectures
